name: Slot recommendation: agent trajectory over the mock fixtures
description: Golden dataset for the conversational slot-recommendation agent, built deterministically from smart_assignment.mock_customers by eval/build_evalset.py. Phase 2a scores TOOL TRAJECTORY only (see eval/data/test_config.json); the expected final responses are captured with a live backend in Phase 2b. Regenerate with:  python3 -m eval.build_evalset

parts.text: New prospect Bayou City Bistro at 1200 McKinney St, Houston, TX 77010. About 90 cases a week. They'd like Tuesday mornings, 7 to 10am.

SITUATION
Bayou City Bistro, 90-case order, escalated due to no routes meeting truck capacity constraints.

ROOT CAUSE
All routes failed the 90% utilization limit: 3114 - Route 647 (91% utilization), 1136 - Route 393 (93% utilization), and 2142 - Route 466 (112% utilization).

OPTIONS (most workable first)
1) 3114 - Route 647 · Wednesday — 91% utilization, 132 cases of headroom
   Action: Override capacity limit for this route.
   Trade-off: Minimal, as it remains within overall vehicle safety margins.
2) 1136 - Route 393 · Monday — 93% utilization, 44 cases of headroom
   Action: Override capacity limit or remove one existing stop.
   Trade-off: Higher utilization risk; requires coordination with existing accounts.
3) 2142 - Route 466 · Tuesday — 112% utilization
   Action: Significant rerouting or offloading required.
   Trade-off: Extremely disruptive; high effort to rebalance.

RECOMMENDATION
Start with 3114 - Route 647; it has the lowest utilization overrun (91%) and the largest capacity headroom (132 cases).

DECISION NEEDED
Do you approve overriding the capacity constraint for 3114 - Route 647 to accommodate this delivery on Wednesday?
Set up Galleria Grill & Catering, 5085 Westheimer Rd, Houston, TX 77056. Large catering account, 400 cases. No particular day or time preference.
New customer Katy Prairie Steakhouse, 5000 Katy Mills Cir, Katy, TX 77494. 260 cases. Prefers Tuesday early morning, 6 to 8am.
Onboard Woodlands Fresh Cafe at 1201 Lake Woodlands Dr, The Woodlands, TX 77380. 150 cases. Thursday late morning, 9am to noon works.

I have analyzed the delivery routes for Woodlands Fresh Cafe at 1201 Lake Woodlands Dr. 

**Decision Summary:** I recommend assigning **1119 - Route 102** on **Monday** with a delivery window of **05:45-08:45**.

**Primary Reasons:**
1.  **Geographic Fit:** The route has an average distance of 1.1 miles to existing stops.
2.  **Capacity Headroom:** The truck will be at approximately 67% capacity after this order, which is safely within the 75% comfort limit (390 cases of headroom).
3.  **Preferred-window match:** Please note that this route runs on Monday, rather than your preferred Thursday.
4.  **Slot Openness:** There is a tier-weighted contention of 1.60 from committed stops sharing this window.

**Key Trade-off:** This option edges out the runner-up on the overall route-slot score (0.65 versus 0.62) and either matches or leads the runner-up across all scored factors. The runner-up is **1119 - Route 102** on **Monday** in the **09:00-12:00** window (which scored 0.62).

*Note: The primary route nearest to your location, 5040 - Route 561 (Friday), was found to be infeasible due to truck capacity constraints.*
